sentences.target: Tu as pris mon cahier ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ty a pʁi mɔ̃ ka.je sə ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu as pris mon cahier ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ty a pʁi mɔ̃ ka.je sə ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: Did you take my notebook this morning.
translations.de: Hast du heute Morgen mein Heft genommen?
translations.it: Hai preso il mio quaderno stamattina?
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天早上拿了我的笔记本吗？
translations.yue: 你今朝有冇攞我本筆記簿？
translations.ru: Ты сегодня утром взял мою тетрадь?
translations.pt: Você pegou meu caderno hoje de manhã?
translations.tr: Bu sabah defterimi sen mi aldın?
translations.vi: Sáng nay bạn có lấy quyển vở của tôi không?
translations.nl: Heb jij vanmorgen mijn schrift meegenomen?
translations.uk: Ти сьогодні вранці взяв мій зошит?
translations.hi: क्या तुमने आज सुबह मेरी कॉपी ली थी?
translations.pl: Czy wziąłeś dziś rano mój zeszyt?
translations.el: Πήρες το τετράδιό μου σήμερα το πρωί;
translations.nb: Tok du skriveboka mi i morges?
translations.id: Apa kamu mengambil buku catatan aku tadi pagi?
translations.sv: Tog du min anteckningsbok i morse?
translations.ro: Ai luat caietul meu în dimineața asta?
translations.cs: Vzal jsi dnes ráno můj sešit?
translations.da: Tog du min notesbog i morges?
translations.ja: 今朝、私のノートを持っていったの？

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; functions as the subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; used to form the passé composé with the past participle.
Past participle of the main lexical verb; combines with the auxiliary to form the passé composé and takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees with a masculine singular noun and indicates possession.
Common noun; direct object of the verb ('pris').
Demonstrative determiner modifying a temporal noun ('matin') to form a time expression.
Common noun heading a temporal noun phrase ('ce matin') functioning as an adverbial time complement.

sentences.target: Je retrouve mon cahier près de la fenêtre.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁə.tʁuv mɔ̃ ka.je pʁɛ də la fə.nɛtʁ/

translations.fr: Je retrouve mon cahier près de la fenêtre.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁə.tʁuv mɔ̃ ka.je pʁɛ də la fə.nɛtʁ/
translations.en: I find my notebook by the window.
translations.es: Encontré mi cuaderno junto a la ventana.
translations.de: Ich habe mein Heft am Fenster gefunden.
translations.it: Ho trovato il mio quaderno vicino alla finestra.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在窗边找到了我的笔记本。
translations.yue: 我喺窗邊搵到我本筆記簿。
translations.ru: Я нашёл свою тетрадь у окна.
translations.pt: Encontrei meu caderno perto da janela.
translations.he: מצאתי את המחברת שלי ליד החלון.
translations.vi: Tôi tìm thấy quyển vở của mình bên cửa sổ.
translations.nl: Ik vond mijn schrift bij het raam.
translations.uk: Я знайшов свій зошит біля вікна.
translations.hi: मुझे खिड़की के पास अपनी कॉपी मिल गई।
translations.el: Βρήκα το τετράδιό μου δίπλα στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Jeg fant skriveboka mi ved vinduet.
translations.id: Aku menemukan buku catatanku di dekat jendela.
translations.sv: Jag hittade min anteckningsbok vid fönstret.
translations.cs: Našel jsem svůj sešit u okna.
translations.da: Jeg fandt min notesbog ved vinduet.
translations.ja: 窓際で自分のノートを見つけた。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees with a masculine singular noun.
Common noun; direct object of the verb ('retrouve').
Preposition (first element of the complex preposition 'près de') introducing a locative complement.
Preposition; second element of 'près de' linking to the noun phrase that expresses the location.
Definite article; feminine singular, agrees with 'fenêtre'.
Common noun; object of the preposition ('de'), forming a locative prepositional phrase.

sentences.target: On doit acheter un cahier aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: On doit acheter un cahier aujourd'hui.
translations.en: We need to buy a notebook today.
translations.es: Tenemos que comprar un cuaderno hoy.
translations.de: Wir müssen heute ein Heft kaufen.
translations.ko: 오늘 우리 공책을 하나 사야 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天需要买一个笔记本。
translations.yue: 我哋今日要買本筆記簿。
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta cần mua một quyển vở.
translations.nl: We moeten vandaag een schrift kopen.
translations.hi: हमें आज एक कॉपी खरीदनी है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να αγοράσουμε ένα τετράδιο σήμερα.
translations.nb: Vi må kjøpe en skrivebok i dag.
translations.id: Kita perlu membeli sebuah buku catatan hari ini.
translations.sv: Vi behöver köpa en anteckningsbok i dag.
translations.ro: Trebuie să cumpărăm un caiet azi.
translations.da: Vi skal købe en notesbog i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はノートを買う必要がある。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; impersonal/collective, often meaning 'we' in colloquial usage.
Main verb used as a modal; present indicative 3rd person singular, selecting an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of the modal 'doit'.
Indefinite article; masculine singular, introducing a countable noun.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'acheter'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Vous écrivez dans le cahier de groupe.
sentences.reading: /vu ze.kʁi.ve dɑ̃ lə ka.je də ɡʁup/

translations.fr: Vous écrivez dans le cahier de groupe.
translations.ipa: /vu ze.kʁi.ve dɑ̃ lə ka.je də ɡʁup/
translations.en: You are writing in the group notebook.
translations.es: Estás escribiendo en el cuaderno del grupo.
translations.it: Stai scrivendo nel quaderno del gruppo.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在小组的笔记本里写字。
translations.yue: 你而家喺小組嗰本筆記簿度寫嘢。
translations.pt: Você está escrevendo no caderno do grupo.
translations.vi: Bạn đang viết vào quyển vở nhóm.
translations.hi: तुम समूह की कॉपी में लिख रहे हो।
translations.id: Kamu sedang menulis di buku catatan kelompok.
translations.ja: グループのノートに書いている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun; 2nd person plural (or formal singular).
Main verb; present indicative 2nd person plural.
Simple preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article; masculine singular, agrees with 'cahier'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement ('de groupe').
Common noun; complement of the noun ('cahier') introduced by 'de'.
